triage_rows.direction: keep_the_program_on_low-cost_single-row_control-packet polling when the packet-change signal remains stable
treat_top_risk_reference_change_as_a_legitimate_top-level packet update because it changes the current dominant risk anchor
treat_top_opportunity_reference_change_as_a_legitimate top-level packet update because it changes the current dominant opportunity anchor
treat_top_watch_symbol_change_or_top_watch_bundle_change_as_a_legitimate top-level packet update because it changes the current symbol-first watchset

interpretation: This is the topmost change detector for the single-row control packet.
A consumer can stay on this layer most of the time and only reopen the control packet when it changes.
The layer now also captures symbol-watch rotations, so symbol-first consumers can stop one layer higher.
